Source: Perplexity API Reference
URL: https://docs.perplexity.ai/api-reference
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Perplexity Agent API Reference

## Core Endpoint
POST /v1/agent — Generate responses with optional web search and reasoning

## Authentication
Bearer token (HTTPBearer security scheme)

## Supported Models
- Provider/model format (e.g., "xai/grok-4-1", "openai/gpt-4o")
- Model fallback chains: up to 5 models attempted sequentially
- Presets: "fast-search", "pro-search", "deep-research"

## Key Parameters
- input: Message content (string or array format)
- model: Single model or fallback chain (up to 5)
- models: Fallback chain (max 5 models)
- preset: Pre-configured settings ("fast-search", "pro-search", "deep-research")
- instructions: Custom system prompts for the model
- language_preference: ISO 639-1 language codes
- max_output_tokens: Configurable maximum output tokens (minimum 1)
- max_steps: Research loops (1-10 maximum)
- stream: Boolean for SSE streaming vs. standard JSON response
- reasoning: Effort levels (low/medium/high)
- response_format: JSON schema validation

## Tools Available
1. WebSearchTool — domain/date filtering, token limits, and location personalization
2. FetchUrlTool — up to 10 URLs per tool call, extract content from URLs
3. FunctionTool — custom function integration with JSON schema parameters

## Output Formatting
- Structured JSON schema validation for constrained outputs
- Non-streaming (stream: false): application/json, returns complete ResponsesResponse object
- Streaming (stream: true): text/event-stream, emits Server-Sent Events with discriminated types
- 14+ distinct SSE event types: response creation, progress updates, text deltas, reasoning phases, search queries/results, URL fetching operations

## Response Object
- Response ID, status, output items, token usage, cost breakdown in USD
- Status indicators: completed, failed, in_progress, requires_action
- Detailed cost breakdown: input tokens, output tokens, cache operations, tool invocations

## Research Features
- Maximum research loop steps configurable (1-10)
- Pro-search and deep-research presets with bundled system prompts and search parameters
